case_title: PHILLIPS, ROBERT G. vs. OAKLEY, BRIAN et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF GEORGE B. ALTENBERG, JR. RE: STATUS CONFERENCE FILED BY PLAINTIFF PHILLIPS, ROBERT G.

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF JAN-06-1994, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON JAN-06-1994, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4) HEARING SET FOR FEB-07-1994 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
OSC CALENDAR OF FEB-07-1994, CONTINUED TO MAR-24-1994 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 PLAINTIFF TO GIVE NOTICE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PHILLIPS, ROBERT G. AS TO DEFENDANT OAKLEY, BRIAN UKIAH TIMBER PRODUCTS KIRTLEY, WILLIAM R., JR. SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          JAN-06-1994 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  NOV-08-1993 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       DEC-17-1993
